tests.title: User can log in with valid credentials
preconditions: User is on the login page
steps: Enter a registered email address into the email field
Enter the correct password into the password field
tests.expected_result: User is redirected to the dashboard and sees their name in the header.

tests.title: User cannot log in with an incorrect password
preconditions: User is on the login page
steps: Enter a registered email address into the email field
Enter an incorrect password into the password field
tests.expected_result: An error message is displayed: 'Invalid email or password.'

notes: Sample reference output for PROJ-1. Used in offline evaluation.
